mapper.sql: AA.BOARD_MST_ID , AA.BOARD_NAME , AA.BOARD_TYPE , AA.BOARD_DESC , AA.USE_YN , AA.RGTR , TO_CHAR(AA.RGT_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RGT_DTTM , AA.CHNR , TO_CHAR(AA.CHNG_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHNG_DTTM
mapper.select:
/* com.erns.coching.board.mapper.BoardMasterDAO.getListCount */
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_BOARD_MST AA LEFT OUTER JOIN T_BOARD_OPT BB ON AA.BOARD_MST_ID = BB.BOARD_MST_ID
